highlights.text: My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
My lean was they would be able to.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “In a strong bull case tomorrow though, ES won’t even backtest 6952.
As I’ve specified at length, insitutions in ES buy dips in a very particular way: Via my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
As always, this trap down would setup a strong squeeze, but only on the Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.
Next slate of targets are 6997, 7014, 7032, 7049.” We trapped below 6982 last evening, then we ran nicely to 7014 by this morning.

post_title: FOMC & Earnings Tomorrow. Can Bulls Survive It? Jan 28th Plan
